feed.title: Rainbowow
feed.subtitle: upload something about leetcode problems and CV

entry.title: Start this Blog
entry.summary: Start this blog Follow the tutorials from github and chirpy using chirpy-starter to easily build your site Some problems My environment: Windows10 and using ruby3 When locally setting up this blog, bundle returned LoadError: cannot load such file webrick I tried this and it worked. Using bundle add webrick to re-add webrick
